test.notes: Full suite exited with only the 2 known pre-existing failures documented in AGENTS.md: aiOrchestratorService single-lane integration closing strategy and orchestratorService unified-attempt laneId handling. No additional failures were observed (1066 passed, 2 failed).

lint.notes: Lint is not configured in the project manifest.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-ART-001 remains unmet on rerun: the fix registers planning output as an orchestrator artifact via register("plan", "custom", ...), but mission Evidence/Artifacts semantics still depend on missionService.addArtifact() with type 'plan'. The renderer normalizes orchestrator artifacts by kind, so the entry surfaces as 'custom' rather than a mission plan artifact.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly distinguish mission artifacts created through missionService.addArtifact() from orchestrator artifacts created through registerArtifact()/register(...), and require contract-focused workers to validate the actual renderer-facing artifact surface instead of assuming artifactKey equivalence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun fix targeted registerArtifact with artifactKey 'plan', but renderer normalization still keys off orchestrator artifact.kind and only missionService.addArtifact() satisfies the intended mission Evidence/Artifacts contract for a 'plan' artifact.
